name: Ensalada De Jicama y Naranja (Jicama and Orange Salad)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the lime juice and habanero chili powder.
2. Arrange orange segments on a platter.
3. Scatter jicama and scallion pieces over the oranges.
4. Drizzle the lime-habanero mixture over the salad.
5. Garnish with chopped cilantro.
6. Serve immediately.
